title: GPT 5.6 explained in 8min..
summary: Caleb Writes Code reviews OpenAI's announcement of GPT 5.6, noting government regulation as the AI industry matures. The video compares OpenAI's consolidated model lineup (Sol, Terra, Luna) with Anthropic's models (Mythos 5, Fable 5), which faced regulatory pause.
writeup: The video covers OpenAI's announcement of GPT 5.6 and its regulatory status as the AI industry matures. It contrasts OpenAI's approach with Anthropic's Mythos 5 and Fable 5, which were controversially paused, and it details OpenAI's consolidation into three offerings: Sol, Terra, and Luna. Recurring themes include model pruning and government regulation.
